headline: Is Nebius Group (NBIS) Using Its $10 Billion Finland AI Campus to Redefine Capital Intensity?
summary: Nebius Group recently announced plans to build a new AI “factory” data center campus in Lappeenranta, Finland, with up to 310 MW of capacity, adding to its expanded Mäntsälä site and broader multi‑gigawatt global build‑out. The project, backed by a broader ecosystem that includes large long-term contracts with Microsoft and Meta and a focus on low‑carbon, heat‑recycling infrastructure, underlines how AI compute demand is reshaping regional economies, energy use, and labor markets in Finland...
